scripts.bootstrap: pnpm install && cd packages/foundry && (forge install foundry-rs/forge-std --no-git 2>/dev/null || true) && (forge install OpenZeppelin/openzeppelin-contracts --no-git 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.fund-wallet:local: cd packages/foundry && dotenv -e ../../.env -e ../nextjs/.env.local -- forge script script/FundWallet.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast --sig "run(uint256)"
scripts.fund-wallet:sepolia: cd packages/foundry && dotenv -e ../../.env -e ../nextjs/.env.local -- forge script script/FundWallet.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --sig "run(uint256)"
scripts.demo-seed:local: dotenv -e .env -e packages/nextjs/.env.local -- bash -c 'cd packages/foundry && forge script script/DemoSeed.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast'
scripts.demo-seed:sepolia: dotenv -e .env -e packages/nextjs/.env.local -- bash -c 'cd packages/foundry && forge script script/DemoSeed.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --slow'
scripts.gate: pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build
scripts.deploy:local: dotenv -c -- bash -c 'cd packages/foundry && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url http://127.0.0.1:8545 --broadcast' && tsx scripts/generate-deployed-contracts.ts 31337
scripts.deploy:sepolia: dotenv -c -- bash -c 'cd packages/foundry && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url base-sepolia --broadcast --slow' && tsx scripts/generate-deployed-contracts.ts 84532
scripts.clean: cd packages/foundry && forge clean && cd ../nextjs && rm -rf .next
